guardrails: This artifact plans UX acceptance gap repair; it does not implement missing FR behavior.
No FR item is marked accepted and EXIT-P1-1 remains not_ready.
Dependency-gated work stays blocked until the corresponding W1.5.171 dependency gate receives explicit human approval.
A4 candidate evidence is routed to a review manifest before any acceptance claim.
W1.5.174 does not modify accepted spec, ADR, schema, generated schema, dependency, runtime behavior, production renderer behavior, packaging, updater, or baseline docx content.

repair_tracks.objective: Convert already available stream-panel candidate evidence into repeatable A4 UX review captures without marking acceptance early.
entry_criteria: W1.5.173 evidence map has candidate evidence for every FR in this track.
Focused React tests and visual smoke matrix commands remain available as reviewer evidence inputs.
planned_repair_steps: Create an A4 evidence runner/review manifest that references existing focused tests and visual smoke matrix cases.
Capture collapsed stream, expanded stream, and event classification paths as separate review items.
Keep all review outputs explicit about pending A4 acceptance.
planned_verification: A4 review manifest check introduced by W1.5.175

repair_tracks.objective: Turn local shell, Dock, File Tree, node selection, Task Drawer, and shortcut scaffold evidence into A4-ready desktop UX paths.
entry_criteria: No new dependency is required for the first local UI evidence bundle.
Any packaging or cross-platform claim for FR-001 stays outside this track until packaging gates are approved.
planned_repair_steps: Define concrete first-level Dock module coverage and collapse/restore expectations.
Capture File Tree default-hidden Drawer and node-to-Task Drawer binding evidence.
Record Task Drawer field coverage gaps and a user-visible shortcut command map.
planned_verification: Targeted A4 review manifest checks after W1.5.175

repair_tracks.objective: Replace local-only Chat Box, snapshot, and artifact surfaces with project/runtime-backed flows while preserving safe evidence contracts.
entry_criteria: Runtime command, snapshot, and artifact IPC boundaries are reviewed before implementation.
Chat evidence remains metadata-only and raw-draft-free.
planned_repair_steps: Route Chat Box submissions to runtime command handling without unsafe prompt persistence.
Bind Version Snapshot actions to runtime/Git snapshot operations.
Expose node artifacts in Task Drawer with project-scoped open/download behavior.
planned_verification: Targeted visual smoke for runtime-backed desktop flow after implementation

repair_tracks.objective: Build desktop UX paths for execution mode, project creation, Git initialization, Skill management, and semi-auto HITL behavior already represented in backend/schema evidence.
entry_criteria: Runtime APIs for the selected flow are available or stubbed behind fail-closed desktop controls.
Git initialization and HITL flows stay aligned with runtime_harness.md and workflow_run.md.
planned_repair_steps: Add execution mode controls near the run action and bind them to runtime execution policy.
Implement project creation with mandatory Git initialization and reference upload entry points.
Expose Skill candidates/configuration safely and capture semi-auto pause/resume confirmation UX.
planned_verification: A8 git-history audit evidence after desktop project creation is implemented

repair_tracks.objective: Implement real React Flow Canvas behavior and Canvas controls only after explicit approval of the React Flow dependency gate.
entry_criteria: DEP-REACT-FLOW status changes from pending_human_approval to approved through a human decision.
@xyflow/react remains absent until that approval exists.
planned_repair_steps: Install the approved React Flow package only in the dependency implementation slice.
Replace read-only Canvas scaffold with React Flow branch, parallel, feedback-loop, pan, zoom, fit view, and edit-lock behavior.
Add 100-node interaction evidence before claiming EXIT-P1-12 readiness.
planned_verification: Electron visual smoke matrix with 100-node Canvas interaction evidence

repair_tracks.objective: Implement reference import, enable, disable, and view actions as a new desktop/runtime-backed capability before A4 review.
entry_criteria: Reference manifest and storage boundaries are aligned with runtime_harness.md before UI work starts.
Sensitive reference material remains local unless an explicit runtime policy allows otherwise.
planned_repair_steps: Define the project reference manifest contract used by the desktop File Tree/reference surface.
Add import, enable, disable, and view controls with safe metadata display.
Capture A4 review evidence for reference lifecycle operations.
planned_verification: Reference lifecycle A4 evidence after implementation

implementation_sequence.reason: Fastest path to convert existing candidate evidence into formal A4 review inputs without implementation drift.
Can improve A4 readiness inside the approved minimal dependency group.
Turns local scaffolds into real project/runtime-backed flows after UI evidence baselines are stable.
Requires coordinated runtime/API and desktop UX work across project, Git, Skill, and HITL flows.
FR-013 has no current implementation and needs a dedicated lifecycle slice.
Must remain blocked until DEP-REACT-FLOW is explicitly approved.

next_recommended_slices.title: A4 evidence runner and review manifest
next_recommended_slices.reason: Convert FR-009, FR-010, and FR-016 candidate evidence into repeatable A4 review inputs.

next_recommended_slices.title: Local UI evidence repair bundle
next_recommended_slices.reason: Prepare shell, Dock, File Tree, node selection, Task Drawer, and shortcut evidence inside the approved dependency boundary.

next_recommended_slices.title: Runtime-backed desktop flow repair planning
next_recommended_slices.reason: Plan Chat Box routing, snapshot restore, artifact actions, and project/runtime bridge work before implementation.
